title: Vallal
desc: Durairasu is heartbroken when the girl he loves marries another man. However, when the girl and her husband die in an accident, Durairasu dedicates his life to bring up their daughter.

title: 36 Vayathinile
desc: Vasanthi leads a mundane life until her friend encourages her to rediscover herself.

title: Periya Idathu Penn
desc: Murugappa is a small time farm labourer living in a village with his widowed sister, Gangamma. He often questions the landlord's authority which results in frequent clashes with him and his family.

title: Darling 2
desc: Five friends on a holiday in Valparai find their getaway turning eerie when they sense the haunting presence of a friend who recently died by suicide.

title: Bhooloham
desc: Boologam and Arumugam are two famous boxers whose families are arch-rivals. Taking this into consideration, Deepak, a businessman, hatches a plan to use their rivalry to his advantage.
